name: gemini-mcp
description: Gemini CLI integration for OpenTaxCopilot - Google product expertise, tax authority research, and ADK consultation

tools.name: consult_gemini
tools.description: Get AI assistance from Gemini for Google products, frameworks, ADK, or tax-related queries

tools.name: analyze_google_integration
tools.description: Analyze codebase for Google ADK, Gemini API, or Vertex AI integration issues

tools.name: research_tax_authority_api
tools.description: Research tax authority APIs and official portals for a specific jurisdiction

tools.name: troubleshoot_google_error
tools.description: Troubleshoot errors related to Google products/frameworks

tools.name: security_review
tools.description: Run security review on Google Cloud configurations

tools.name: gemini_quota_status
tools.description: Get daily quota status (requests made, remaining, limit)
